5:11.6 | [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Margaret Woodbridge](/wiki/Margaret_Woodbridge "Margaret Woodbridge") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Frances Schroth](/wiki/Frances_Schroth "Frances Schroth") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Irene Guest](/wiki/Irene_Guest "Irene Guest") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Ethelda Bleibtrey](/wiki/Ethelda_Bleibtrey "Ethelda Bleibtrey") | [Antwerp](/wiki/Antwerp "Antwerp") ([BEL](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium")) | 29 August 1920

5:11.6 | [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Margaret Woodbridge](/wiki/Margaret_Woodbridge "Margaret Woodbridge") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Frances Schroth](/wiki/Frances_Schroth "Frances Schroth") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Irene Guest](/wiki/Irene_Guest "Irene Guest") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Ethelda Bleibtrey](/wiki/Ethelda_Bleibtrey "Ethelda Bleibtrey") | [Antwerp](/wiki/Antwerp "Antwerp") ([BEL](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium")) | 29 August 1920

[Euphrasia Donnelly](/wiki/Euphrasia_Donnelly "Euphrasia Donnelly"), [Gertrude Ederle](/wiki/Gertrude_Ederle "Gertrude Ederle"), [Ethel Lackie](/wiki/Ethel_Lackie "Ethel Lackie"), and [Mariechen Wehselau](/wiki/Mariechen_Wehselau "Mariechen Wehselau") ([USA](/wiki/United_States_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics "United States at the 1924 Summer Olympics")) | 4:58.8 **WR**

[Florence Barker](/wiki/Florence_Barker_(swimmer) "Florence Barker (swimmer)"), [Constance Jeans](/wiki/Constance_Jeans "Constance Jeans"), [Grace McKenzie](/wiki/Grace_McKenzie "Grace McKenzie"), and [Iris Tanner](/wiki/Iris_Tanner "Iris Tanner") ([GBR](/wiki/Great_Britain_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics "Great Britain at the 1924 Summer Olympics")) | 5:17.0

[Aina Berg](/wiki/Aina_Berg "Aina Berg"), [Gurli Ewerlund](/wiki/Gurli_Ewerlund "Gurli Ewerlund"), [Wivan Pettersson](/wiki/Wivan_Pettersson "Wivan Pettersson"), and [Hjördis Töpel](/wiki/Hj%C3%B6rdis_T%C3%B6pel "Hjördis Töpel") ([SWE](/wiki/Sweden_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics "Sweden at the 1924 Summer Olympics")) | 5:35.6

[Vibeke Møller](/wiki/Vibeke_M%C3%B8ller "Vibeke Møller"), [Agnete Olsen](/wiki/Agnete_Olsen "Agnete Olsen"), [Hedevig Rasmussen](/wiki/Hedevig_Rasmussen "Hedevig Rasmussen"), and [Karen Maud Rasmussen](/wiki/Karen_Maud_Rasmussen "Karen Maud Rasmussen") ([DEN](/wiki/Denmark_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics "Denmark at the 1924 Summer Olympics")) | 5:42.4

[Ernestine Lebrun](/wiki/Ernestine_Lebrun "Ernestine Lebrun"), [Gilberte Mortier](/wiki/Gilberte_Mortier "Gilberte Mortier"), [Bienna Pélégry](/wiki/Bienna_P%C3%A9l%C3%A9gry "Bienna Pélégry"), and [Mariette Protin](/wiki/Mariette_Protin "Mariette Protin") ([FRA](/wiki/France_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics "France at the 1924 Summer Olympics")) | 5:43.4

[Mietje Baron](/wiki/Mietje_Baron "Mietje Baron"), [Alida Bolten](/wiki/Alida_Bolten "Alida Bolten"), [Truus Klapwijk](/wiki/Truus_Klapwijk "Truus Klapwijk"), and [Maria Vierdag](/wiki/Maria_Vierdag "Maria Vierdag") ([NED](/wiki/Netherlands_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics "Netherlands at the 1924 Summer Olympics")) | 5:45.8

was a [swimming](/wiki/Swimming_(sport) "Swimming (sport)") event held as part of the [swimming at the 1924 Summer Olympics](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics "Swimming at the 1924 Summer Olympics") programme.[[1]](#cite_note-SportsRef-1) It was the third appearance of the event, which had been established in 1912. The competition was held on Friday 18 July 1924.

["Swimming at the 1924 Paris Summer Games: Women's 4 × 100 metres Freestyle Relay"](https://web.archive.org/web/20200417165930/https://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/summer/1924/SWI/womens-4-x-100-metres-freestyle-relay.html). *Sports Reference*. Archived from [the original](https://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/summer/1924/SWI/womens-4-x-100-metres-freestyle-relay.html) on 17 April 2020. Retrieved 4 September 2016.

sections: Swimming at the 1924 Summer Olympics – Women's 4 × 100 metre freestyle relay
first_paragraph: The **women's 4 × 100 metre [freestyle](/wiki/Freestyle_swimming "Freestyle swimming") relay** was a [swimming](/wiki/Swimming_(sport) "Swimming (sport)") event held as part of the [swimming at the 1924 Summer Olympics](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics "Swimming at the 1924 Summer Olympics") programme.[[1]](#cite_note-SportsRef-1) It was the third appearance of the event, which had been established in 1912. The competition was held on Friday 18 July 1924.

| * [v](/wiki/Template:SwimmingAt1924SummerOlympics "Template:SwimmingAt1924SummerOlympics") * [t](/wiki/Template_talk:SwimmingAt1924SummerOlympics "Template talk:SwimmingAt1924SummerOlympics") * [e](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Template:SwimmingAt1924SummerOlympics "Special:EditPage/Template:SwimmingAt1924SummerOlympics") | | |

The **women's 4 × 100 metre [freestyle](/wiki/Freestyle_swimming "Freestyle swimming") relay** was a [swimming](/wiki/Swimming_(sport) "Swimming (sport)") event held as part of the [swimming at the 1924 Summer Olympics](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics "Swimming at the 1924 Summer Olympics") programme.[[1]](#cite_note-SportsRef-1) It was the third appearance of the event, which had been established in 1912. The competition was held on Friday 18 July 1924.

## Records

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Swimming_at_the_1924_Summer_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_4_%C3%97_100_metre_freestyle_relay&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Records")]

These were the standing world and Olympic records (in minutes) prior to the 1924 Summer Olympics.

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| World record | 5:11.6 | [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Margaret Woodbridge](/wiki/Margaret_Woodbridge "Margaret Woodbridge") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Frances Schroth](/wiki/Frances_Schroth "Frances Schroth") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Irene Guest](/wiki/Irene_Guest "Irene Guest") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Ethelda Bleibtrey](/wiki/Ethelda_Bleibtrey "Ethelda Bleibtrey") | [Antwerp](/wiki/Antwerp "Antwerp") ([BEL](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium")) | 29 August 1920 |
| Olympic record | 5:11.6 | [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Margaret Woodbridge](/wiki/Margaret_Woodbridge "Margaret Woodbridge") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Frances Schroth](/wiki/Frances_Schroth "Frances Schroth") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Irene Guest](/wiki/Irene_Guest "Irene Guest") [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Ethelda Bleibtrey](/wiki/Ethelda_Bleibtrey "Ethelda Bleibtrey") | [Antwerp](/wiki/Antwerp "Antwerp") ([BEL](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium")) | 29 August 1920 |

The United States set a new world record and broke the five-minute barrier with 4:58.8 minutes.
